title: Come create Alice's 'wonderland' at the George Library
description: GEORGE NEWS - Calling all creatives in...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - Calling all creatives in George! George Library invites you to tumble down the rabbit hole and join us on a fantastical journey through the beloved classic, Alice in Wonderland by Lewis Carroll, this afternoon.

To celebrate Literacy Month, we invite writers, readers and innovators to deconstruct and reimagine the timeless tale, chapter by chapter.


> Join us today, 5 September, at 15:30 in the foyer of George Library to find some inspiration and more information about this collaborative masterpiece and see how you can bring your own twist to the story in a creative way.


Whether you're a painter, poet or performer, we want you to join the 'curiouser and curiouser' adventure: come and learn how we will go about this immersive project. Select your chapter and be inspired by fellow creatives about becoming part of an unique experience.

You are not an artist? No artistic skills are required! Just bring your curiosity and enthusiasm.

Whether you an art enthusiast, a literature lover or simply curious about the creative process, come and enjoy the company of like-minded individuals.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
